name: Checkerboard Square Clam Crunch
recipeInstructions:
DO NOT drain the clams.
+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
++++++++++++++++++
1. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, pepper, and parsley. Gradually add liquid from canned clams until smooth.
2. Add egg and clams to the mixture. Mix well. Stir in Rice Chex to coat evenly. Let stand for 10 minutes.
3. Heat oil to a depth of 1/8 inch in a frying pan.
4. Drop heaping tablespoons of clam mixture into hot oil, forming patties about 3 inches in diameter.
5. Brown the patties over medium heat. Turn them and brown on the other side.
6. Drain patties on absorbent paper towels.
7. Serve with sour cream.
